evidence.title: Spreadsheet formula pain
evidence.snippet: Operators ask for spreadsheet formula helpers.
evidence.normalized_text: Operators repeatedly ask for spreadsheet formula helpers that explain Excel formulas and fix broken sheets.

evidence.title: Prerender SEO pain
evidence.normalized_text: Indie teams search for prerender and SEO rendering fixes because bots cannot index JavaScript-heavy pages.

evidence.title: Review mining
evidence.normalized_text: Store metadata and reviews mention product gap summaries, review clustering, and workflows for finding missing features.
